description: Tiny httpd for acme challenges, redirecting everything else to https
builtUsing: rust-asn1-rs (= 0.7.2+ds-1), rust-colored (= 3.1.1-1), rust-nix (= 0.30.1-3), rust-oid-registry (= 0.8.1-2), rust-rustls (= 0.23.40+ds-1), rust-rustls-native-certs (= 0.8.3-1), rust-rustls-pki-types (= 1.14.1+ds-1), rust-rustls-platform-verifier (= 0.6.2-1), rust-rustls-webpki (= 0.103.13+ds-1), rust-ureq (= 3.3.0+ds+~0.6.0+ds-2), rust-x509-parser (= 0.18.1+ds-1), rustc (= 1.95.0+dfsg1-2)
